# JSClassRetain(_:)

**Function**

Retains a JavaScript class.

## Declaration

```swift
func JSClassRetain(_ jsClass: JSClassRef!) -> JSClassRef!
```

## Parameters

- **jsClass**: The [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSClassRef] to retain.

## Return Value

A [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSClassRef] that is the same as `jsClass`.

## Working with Classes

- **JSClassCreate(_:)**: Creates a JavaScript class.
- **JSClassRelease(_:)**: Releases a JavaScript class.
- **kJSClassDefinitionEmpty**: A class definition structure of the current version that contains null pointers and has no attributes.
- **JSClassDefinition**: A structure that contains properties and callbacks that define a type of object.
- **JSClassAttribute**: A JavaScript class attribute.
